community.clickhouse.clickhouse_cfg_info.short_description: Retrieves ClickHouse config file content and returns it as JSON

community.clickhouse.clickhouse_client.short_description: Execute queries in a ClickHouse database using the clickhouse-driver Client interface
community.clickhouse.clickhouse_client.description: Execute arbitrary queries in a ClickHouse database using the L(clickhouse-driver,https://clickhouse-driver.readthedocs.io/en/latest) Client interface. Always returns that the state changed.

community.clickhouse.clickhouse_db.short_description: Creates or removes a ClickHouse database using the clickhouse-driver Client interface
community.clickhouse.clickhouse_db.description: Creates or removes a ClickHouse database using the L(clickhouse-driver,https://clickhouse-driver.readthedocs.io/en/latest) Client interface.

community.clickhouse.clickhouse_grants.short_description: Manage grants for ClickHouse users and roles
community.clickhouse.clickhouse_grants.description: Grants, updates, or revokes privileges for ClickHouse users and roles. This module uses the L(clickhouse-driver,https://clickhouse-driver.readthedocs.io/en/latest) client interface.

community.clickhouse.clickhouse_info.short_description: Gather ClickHouse server information using the clickhouse-driver Client interface
community.clickhouse.clickhouse_info.description: Gather ClickHouse server information using the L(clickhouse-driver,https://clickhouse-driver.readthedocs.io/en/latest) Client interface. Does not change server state.

community.clickhouse.clickhouse_quota.short_description: Creates or removes a ClickHouse quota
community.clickhouse.clickhouse_quota.description: Creates or removes a ClickHouse quota.

community.clickhouse.clickhouse_role.short_description: Creates or removes a ClickHouse role.
community.clickhouse.clickhouse_role.description: Creates or removes a ClickHouse role.

community.clickhouse.clickhouse_user.short_description: Creates or removes a ClickHouse user using the clickhouse-driver Client interface
community.clickhouse.clickhouse_user.description: Creates or removes a ClickHouse user using the L(clickhouse-driver,https://clickhouse-driver.readthedocs.io/en/latest) Client interface. The module can only create and delete users, without any additional parameters. New features will be added in the future.
